name: sdm-platform
description: Species Distribution Modelling Dashboard — Modern stack (Next.js + Hono API + Plumber R)

scripts.check: pnpm run check:node && pnpm run check:r
scripts.check:node: pnpm run build:shared && pnpm --filter api run typecheck && pnpm --filter frontend run typecheck && pnpm --filter api run lint && pnpm --filter frontend run lint && pnpm --filter api run test && pnpm --filter frontend run test && pnpm --filter api run build && pnpm --filter frontend run build
scripts.check:r: Rscript scripts/smoke_test.R --tags=fast && Rscript tests/testthat.R && Rscript scripts/audit_release.R
scripts.check:compose: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml config && docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml config && DATABASE_URL=postgresql://sdm:dummy@postgres:5432/sdm_platform JWT_SECRET=dummy-jwt-secret-at-least-32-characters PLUMBER_INTERNAL_KEY=dummy-plumber-internal-key POSTGRES_PASSWORD=dummy GARAGE_ACCESS_KEY=dummy GARAGE_SECRET_KEY=dummy GRAFANA_PASSWORD=dummy docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml config
